Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Transcript of Earning Call 
 
In accordance with the provisions of Regulation 30 and all other applicable provisions of the 
Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015 (the Listing Regulations), the transcript of the earnings call on the financial 
results of the Company for the second quarter and half year ended September 30, 2024, held 
on Tuesday, October 29, 2024 can be assessed on the website of the Company at the following 
link:- Earnings-Call-Transcripts-Q2FY25.pdf 
 
Kindly take the same on record. 
 
Thanking you,

For Edelweiss Financial Services Limited
